nasb.text: and five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the tabernacle for the rear side to the west.

esv.text: and five bars for the frames of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the frames of the tabernacle at the rear westward.

cnv.text: 替帳幕第二邊的板也做了五個橫閂，替帳幕後面，就是西面的板也做了五個橫閂，
